raw_consumer_statement: Items were purchased on a business American Express credit card that were never delivered. I am the XXXX  for the credit card holder, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX The original charge was on XX/XX/XXXX for {$70000.00}. The vendor for the purchase was XXXX XXXX XXXX which subsequent to the purchase filed for XXXX  XXXX bankruptcy. The anticipated deleiver date of the items purchase was XX/XX/XXXX. In XX/XX/XXXX we learned that XXXX was having financial difficulties. We asked that the item we purchased be delivered. In XX/XX/XXXX we disputed the original charge with American Express. They began an investigation of the issue. After several months, on XX/XX/XXXX during a phone conversation with XXXX ( AMEX employee ID number XXXX ), a customer service supervisor, I was informed that AMEX would not be crediting our account for the amount, claiming that XXXX provided information that the items had been delivered. I have requested the documentation AMEX says that XXXX provided the information but have not received it.
